summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SP630E LED Controller Phase 7 - Successfully verified removal of Presets and Modes tabs, confirmed exactly 5 tabs present, validated localStorage state persistence, and tested all functionality
passed_tests: Backend APIs - All 10 endpoints working (100% success)
Exactly 5 tabs present (Control, Aquarium, Schedule, Animation, Settings)
Presets/Favorites tab correctly removed (no star icon)
Modes/Planted tab correctly removed (no leaf icon)
Control tab shows 5 sliders without send button
Animation tab displays 'Efekt Hızı' and dynamic effects
Settings tab shows Device Info, SON DURUM, BLE Protocol sections
SON DURUM section displays K/Y/M/SB/SoB channel values
localStorage persistence working with sp630e_last_state key
Disconnect button present in settings tab
